ValidationRule.description: Ensuring Assigned To field has value during Update.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(NOT(ISNEW()), OR(ISPICKVAL(Assigned_To__c,""), ISPICKVAL(Assigned_To__c,"Demo Center")), RecordType.Name = 'System Request')
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_DEMO_LOG: 002 Kindly update Assigned To with value other than Demo Center before Saving the record.
